{{Quote|I was trained to withstand torture, and I'm not afraid to die! So there's nothing you Rebel scum can do to intimidate me!|Milnn, to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="marvel61" />}}
'''Milnn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[TIE pilot]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who was the leader of [[Delta Squadron (TIE/LN)|Delta Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Marvel timeline">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' (p. 121) places the events of the issues [[Star Wars (1977) 52|52]], [[Star Wars (1977) 61|61]], and [[Star Wars (1977) 69|69]] of the [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'' comics]] in 3–3.5 ABY. Thus, all events between can be placed in 3 ABY.</ref> Milnn and his squad were investigating an Imperial distress signal when they were ambushed by a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]]. The other members of the squad were killed, but Milnn survived the battle only to be captured and interrogated by the Rebels. Rebel [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] questioned him for the recognition codes for entrance into the [[secret armada]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] which was transporting the creature known as the [[teezl]] to the Imperial [[Coruscant/Legends|capital]]. Milnn refused to cooperate even under threat of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], but he was quick to talk once [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] took over the interrogation.<ref name="marvel61" />

In an effort to [[Battle of the secret armada|infiltrate]] the secret armada and destroy the teezl, Skywalker impersonated Milnn as "[[Delta Leader/Legends|Delta Leader]]," with his [[Flying Bantha Squadron|Rebel TIE squadron]] posing as Delta Group.<ref name="marvel61" />
